Program
  ProgramHead
    PROGRAM: program
    ID: p
  DeclarePart
    VarDecPart
      VarDec
        VAR: var
        VarDecList
          TypeDef
            BaseType
              INTEGER: integer
          VarIDList
            ID: x
          ;: ;
  ProgramBody
    BEGIN: begin
    StmList
      Stm
        ID: x
        AssignmentRest
          :=: :=
          Exp
            Term
              Factor
                INTC: 1
    END: read
  .: read
